reason: Successfully tested agent message sending and response validation for basic math calculation
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents
Found and clicked on "QA-20260508-234804-vix7" agent in sidebar — Agent detail page opened with message input field visible
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status shows "idle" which meets the requirement
Clicked message input field and typed "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message typed successfully into input field
Clicked Send message button — Message sent, agent transitioned to "working" status, new session "Basic Math Question with QA-20260508" created
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent responded within 2 seconds with the answer "4"
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response clearly shows "4" as the answer, confirming the agent correctly answered the math question
